add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation with 2 mm Border
add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-highlight-annotation.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to locate a specific text on page three and add a yellow highlight annotation over it.

add-sticky-note-annotation.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to PDF
add-sticky-note-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a sticky note (text) annotation with user comments to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add Bookmark to PDF Page
add-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Creates a bookmark titled "Project Overview" that links to page five of a PDF document.

create-nested-bookmarks.title: Create Nested Bookmarks with PdfContentEditor
create-nested-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to add a parent bookmark for Chapter One and child bookmarks for its sections using PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Alert to PDF via Rectangle Annotation
add-javascript-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a rectangle annotation that shows an alert when clicked.

add-js-to-form-button.title: Add JavaScript to Form Button for Total Price Calculation
add-js-to-form-button.description: Creates a PDF with price, quantity, and total fields, adds a button, and attaches JavaScript that computes the total price when the button is pressed.

extract-first-image-page-two.title: Extract First Image from Page Two of PDF as PNG
extract-first-image-page-two.description: Shows how to extract the first image located on the second page of a PDF document and save it as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-embedded-images.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF
extract-embedded-images.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images embedded in a PDF file and save them to a designated folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

add-image-stamp-bottom-right-page-three.title: Add Image Stamp to Bottom‑Right of Page Three
add-image-stamp-bottom-right-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp (logo.png) at the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF.

add-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Red Confidential Text Stamp with Semi-Transparent Background
add-confidential-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a red "Confidential" text stamp with a semi‑transparent background to each page of a PDF document.

reposition-stamp-left-margin.title: Reposition Stamp on Page Four to Left Margin
reposition-stamp-left-margin.description: Demonstrates how to move an existing stamp on page four so that its left edge aligns 10 mm from the page margin using PdfContentEditor.

replace-draft-with-final.title: Replace 'Draft' with 'Final' in PDF
replace-draft-with-final.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of the word Draft with Final in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-uuid-page-six.title: Replace Text with UUID on Specific Page
replace-text-uuid-page-six.description: Demonstrates how to replace the case‑sensitive string "InvoiceNumber" with a generated UUID on page six of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

set-viewer-preference-continuous.title: Set Viewer Preference for Continuous Single‑Page Layout
set-viewer-preference-continuous.description: Shows how to change a PDF's viewer preferences so that pages are displayed in a continuous single‑column layout with the default zoom of 100 %.

read-viewer-preferences.title: Read Viewer Preferences from PDF
read-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the viewer preference flags from a PDF and log the page layout setting.

add-file-attachment.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file attachment (Terms.pdf) into an existing PDF with a description.

remove-attachment.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to delete a named attachment from a PDF to reduce its file size.

apply-password-protection-disable-printi.title: Apply Password Protection and Disable Printing on PDF
apply-password-protection-disable-printi.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user and owner password while disabling the printing permission using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-pdf-permissions-copy-text.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying Text Only
set-pdf-permissions-copy-text.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF so that text can be copied while preventing form field editing and annotation modifications.

add-xmp-metadata.title: Add XMP Author and Title Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add XMP metadata fields for author and title to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-schema-xmp.title: Add Custom Schema to PDF XMP Metadata
add-custom-schema-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to register a custom namespace and add project identifier and version fields to a PDF's XMP metadata.

fill-acroform-text-field.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field Using PdfContentEditor
fill-acroform-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to fill the AcroForm text field 'CustomerName' with a value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades classes.

check-checkbox-field.title: Check a Checkbox Field in PDF Form
check-checkbox-field.description: Demonstrates how to set a checkbox field named 'TermsAccepted' to true in an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

select-radio-button.title: Select Radio Button Option in PDF AcroForm
select-radio-button.description: Demonstrates how to set a radio button field (ShippingMethod) to the value "Express" in an AcroForm PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-page-to-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to extract page 7 of a PDF as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-tiff-lzw.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
pdf-to-tiff-lzw.description: Demonstrates converting an entire PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file using LZW compression via Aspose.Pdf.

jpeg-to-pdf.title: Convert JPEG Image to Single-Page PDF
jpeg-to-pdf.description: Creates a one-page PDF from a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, preserving default margins.

print-pdf-landscape-two-copies.title: Print PDF to Default Printer with Two Copies Landscape
print-pdf-landscape-two-copies.description: Shows how to print a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with two copies and landscape orientation on the default printer.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation.description: Loops through all PDF files in an Input folder and adds a red rectangle annotation to each document.

batch-replace-text-pdf.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Files
batch-replace-text-pdf.description: Replaces all occurrences of the word 'Confidential' with 'Public' in every PDF file within a folder.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: Extracts all images from each PDF file in a directory and saves them into separate subfolders named after the source PDF.

batch-add-js-alert-rectangle-annotations.title: Batch Add JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotations
batch-add-js-alert-rectangle-annotations.description: Opens multiple PDF files, finds rectangle (square) annotations, assigns a JavaScript alert action to each, and saves the modified PDFs.

set-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Set Full‑Screen Viewer Preference for PDFs in a Directory
set-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Batch processes all PDF files in a folder, setting the viewer preference so each document opens in full‑screen mode.

batch-add-pdf-password.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs in a Folder
batch-add-pdf-password.description: Encrypts all PDF files in the "secure" folder with the same user password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

pdf-to-png-transparent.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images with Transparent Background
pdf-to-png-transparent.description: Converts each page of a PDF document to a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI.

add-hyperlink-annotation.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page Two
add-hyperlink-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a clickable hyperlink annotation that opens https://example.com on the second page of a PDF.

add-javascript-calculation.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-calculation.description: Demonstrates adding a JavaScript OnCalculate action to a PDF form field so the Total amount updates automatically when the Quantity field changes.

extract-grayscale-images-page-five.title: Extract Images from Page Five, Convert to Grayscale, and Save as JPEG
extract-grayscale-images-page-five.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all images from page five, saves each as a JPEG, converts the JPEGs to grayscale, and writes the grayscale files.

center-stamp-page-eight.title: Center Stamp on Page Eight of PDF
center-stamp-page-eight.description: Demonstrates how to reposition an existing stamp to the centre of page eight using PdfContentEditor.

replace-annotation-text.title: Replace Text Within PDF Annotations on Specific Pages
replace-annotation-text.description: Demonstrates how to replace a string inside annotation contents on selected pages while leaving the main PDF content unchanged.

hide-toolbar-menubar.title: Hide Toolbar and Menubar in PDF Viewer
hide-toolbar-menubar.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar when the document is opened.

add-pdf-attachment.title: Add PDF Attachment with Custom MIME Type
add-pdf-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF with a custom MIME type (application/pdf) and a description.

remove-attachment-by-pattern.title: Remove PDF Attachments Matching Pattern
remove-attachment-by-pattern.description: Loads a PDF, removes any embedded file whose name ends with '_old.pdf', and saves the result.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit AES and Restrict Editing/Printing
encrypt-pdf-aes128-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit AES encryption and disable editing and printing by applying restrictive permissions.

add-custom-xmp-metadata.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom XMP metadata field named ProjectID with value 12345 to a PDF and save the result.

add-image-stamp-base64.title: Add Image Stamp from Base64 to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-base64.description: Creates an image stamp from a Base64 string and places it on page three at a 50 mm offset from the left and bottom edges.

multiline-text-stamp.title: Create Multiline Text Stamp with Custom Font and Color
multiline-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a multiline text stamp using Arial 14pt blue font to a PDF page.

fill-form-fields-from-json.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON
fill-form-fields-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to import field values from a JSON file into an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png.title: Convert PDF Pages 2-4 to PNG Images with 200 DPI and Transparent Background
convert-pdf-pages-to-png.description: Demonstrates extracting pages 2 to 4 from a PDF and saving each as a PNG image at 200 DPI with a transparent background.

print-pdf-network-printer.title: Print PDF Silently to Network Printer
print-pdf-network-printer.description: Demonstrates how to send a PDF to a network printer using Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer without user interaction.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a rectangle annotation with a dashed border and 50% opacity on page six of a PDF document.

add-js-page-open-log.title: Add JavaScript Action to Log Page Number on Open
add-js-page-open-log.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to each page that logs the current page number to the console when the page is opened.

extract-images-catalog.title: Extract Images and Create PDF Catalog with Thumbnails
extract-images-catalog.description: Extracts all images from a PDF and generates a new PDF that shows each image as a thumbnail with a caption.

reposition-stamp-baseline.title: Reposition Text Stamp to Paragraph Baseline on Page Five
reposition-stamp-baseline.description: Demonstrates how to align a text stamp with the baseline of existing paragraph text on page five of a PDF.

replace-dates-regex.title: Replace Dates Using Regular Expression in PDF
replace-dates-regex.description: Demonstrates how to replace dates formatted as MM/DD/YYYY with YYYY-MM-DD in a PDF using PdfContentEditor and a regular expression.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences for Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
set-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF to open with the thumbnails pane visible and the window sized to fit the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-creator-xmp.title: Update PDF Creator in XMP Metadata
update-pdf-creator-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to read XMP metadata from a PDF, change the creator field, and save the updated PDF.

add-encrypted-attachment.title: Add Encrypted Attachment to PDF with AES
add-encrypted-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a custom description to a PDF and then encrypting the document using AES‑256.

remove-all-bookmarks.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to delete every bookmark from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

create-nested-bookmarks__v2.title: Create Nested Bookmarks in PDF
create-nested-bookmarks__v2.description: Shows how to add a three‑level bookmark hierarchy (section, subsection, sub‑subsection) to an existing PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp.title: Add Underlined Yellow Text Stamp Centered on Page 10
add-underlined-yellow-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a centered text stamp with underline decoration, yellow background, and custom font to page ten of an existing PDF.

add-image-stamp-rotation-opacity.title: Add Image Stamp with Rotation and Opacity to PDF
add-image-stamp-rotation-opacity.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to a PDF, rotating it 45 degrees, setting 0.8 opacity, and positioning it at coordinates (100,200).

fill-pdf-form-defaults.title: Fill PDF Form Fields with Default Values from Configuration
fill-pdf-form-defaults.description: Loads a PDF form, reads default field values from a simple configuration file, fills the fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and saves the updated PDF.

convert-pdf-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to 24‑bit BMP Images
convert-pdf-to-bmp.description: Converts each page of a PDF document into a 24‑bit BMP image using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice.

print-pdf-duplex-collated.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated.description: Demonstrates how to print a PDF document in double‑sided (duplex) mode and request collated multiple copies using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rectangle-annotation.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Fill Color and Border Width
add-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a rectangle (square) annotation with a light gray fill and a 1 pt border to a PDF page.

add-red-rectangle-annotation__v2.title: Add Red Rectangle Annotation with 2 mm Border to PDF Page
add-red-rectangle-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a red rectangle annotation with a 2 mm border thickness to a specific page of an existing PDF.

add-highlight-annotation__v2.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation over a specific text range on page three of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-sticky-note-annotation__v2.title: Add Sticky Note Annotation to PDF Page
add-sticky-note-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky note (text) annotation with user comments to the first page of a PDF document.

add-bookmark-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Bookmark to PDF Page
add-bookmark-to-pdf__v2.description: Adds a bookmark titled "Project Overview" that navigates to page five of a PDF document.

create-nested-bookmarks__v3.title: Create Nested Bookmarks with PdfContentEditor
create-nested-bookmarks__v3.description: Demonstrates how to add a parent bookmark for Chapter One and its subsection bookmarks to a PDF using PdfContentEditor.

add-javascript-rectangle-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotation
add-javascript-rectangle-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a rectangle annotation that shows an alert when clicked.

add-js-calculation-button.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Button
add-js-calculation-button.description: Creates a PDF form with price, quantity, and total fields, adds a button, and attaches JavaScript to calculate the total price when the button is pressed.

extract-first-image-page-two__v2.title: Extract First Image from Page Two and Save as PNG
extract-first-image-page-two__v2.description: Demonstrates how to extract the first image from the second page of a PDF and save it as a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-embedded-images__v2.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF
extract-embedded-images__v2.description: Extracts all images embedded in a PDF file and saves them as PNG files into a specified output folder.

add-image-stamp-bottom-right-page-three_.title: Add Image Stamp to Bottom‑Right of Page Three
add-image-stamp-bottom-right-page-three_.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp from a logo file to the bottom‑right corner of the third page of a PDF.

add-confidential-text-stamp__v2.title: Add Red Confidential Text Stamp with Transparency
add-confidential-text-stamp__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a red "Confidential" text stamp with a semi‑transparent background to all pages of a PDF.

reposition-stamp-left-margin__v2.title: Reposition Stamp on Page Four to Left Margin
reposition-stamp-left-margin__v2.description: Demonstrates how to move an existing stamp on page 4 so that its left edge is 10 mm from the page margin using PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF Document
replace-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to replace all occurrences of the word 'Draft' with 'Final' in a PDF using PdfContentEditor.

replace-invoice-number-uuid.title: Replace InvoiceNumber with UUID on Page Six
replace-invoice-number-uuid.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific text string on a given PDF page with a generated UUID using Aspose.Pdf.

set-viewer-preference-continuous__v2.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Continuous Layout
set-viewer-preference-continuous__v2.description: Shows how to configure a PDF to use a continuous one‑column page layout (single page view) by modifying viewer preferences with Aspose.Pdf.

get-viewer-preferences.title: Get Viewer Preferences from PDF
get-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to read the current viewer preferences of a PDF, including page layout and zoom settings, using PdfContentEditor.

add-file-attachment__v2.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment__v2.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file attachment (Terms.pdf) into an existing PDF with a description.

remove-pdf-attachment.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-pdf-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to delete a named attachment (OldReport.pdf) from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf to reduce file size.

apply-password-protection-disable-printi.title: Apply Password Protection and Disable Printing on PDF
apply-password-protection-disable-printi.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with a user and owner password while disabling the printing permission using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-pdf-permissions-copy-disable-forms-a.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying Text and Block Form Editing & Annotations
set-pdf-permissions-copy-disable-forms-a.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with permissions that allow text copying while preventing form field editing and annotation modifications.

add-xmp-author-title.title: Add XMP Author and Title Metadata to PDF
add-xmp-author-title.description: Demonstrates how to add XMP metadata fields for author and title to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-schema-xmp__v2.title: Add Custom Schema to PDF XMP Metadata
add-custom-schema-xmp__v2.description: Demonstrates how to register a custom namespace and add project identifier and version fields to a PDF's XMP metadata.

fill-acroform-text-field__v2.title: Fill AcroForm Text Field Using PdfContentEditor
fill-acroform-text-field__v2.description: Demonstrates how to fill the AcroForm text field 'CustomerName' with a value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

check-checkbox-field__v2.title: Check Checkbox Field in PDF Form
check-checkbox-field__v2.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically check a checkbox field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

select-radio-button__v2.title: Select Radio Button Option in PDF AcroForm
select-radio-button__v2.description: Demonstrates how to select the 'Express' option of a radio button field named ShippingMethod in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-page-to-png-300dpi.title: Convert PDF Page 7 to High‑Resolution PNG (300 DPI)
convert-pdf-page-to-png-300dpi.description: Extracts page 7 from a PDF and saves it as a 300 DPI PNG image using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter.

pdf-to-tiff-lzw__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF with LZW Compression
pdf-to-tiff-lzw__v2.description: Demonstrates converting an entire PDF document into a single multi‑page TIFF file using LZW compression.

jpeg-to-pdf__v2.title: Convert JPEG Image to Single-Page PDF
jpeg-to-pdf__v2.description: Creates a PDF document with a single page containing the specified JPEG image using default page size and margins.

print-pdf-landscape-two-copies__v2.title: Print PDF with Two Copies in Landscape Orientation
print-pdf-landscape-two-copies__v2.description: Demonstrates printing a PDF to the default printer with two copies and landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation__v2.title: Batch Add Red Rectangle Annotation to PDFs
batch-add-red-rectangle-annotation__v2.description: Loops through all PDF files in the Input folder, adds a red rectangle annotation to the first page of each document, and saves the annotated PDFs.

batch-replace-text-pdf__v2.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Files
batch-replace-text-pdf__v2.description: Replaces all occurrences of the word 'Confidential' with 'Public' in every PDF file within a specified folder.

batch-extract-images.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs to Subfolders
batch-extract-images.description: Extracts all images from each PDF in a folder and saves them into separate subfolders named after the source files.

batch-add-js-alert-rectangle-annotations.title: Batch Add JavaScript Alert to Rectangle Annotations
batch-add-js-alert-rectangle-annotations.description: Opens multiple PDFs, finds rectangle annotations and assigns a JavaScript alert action to each, then saves the modified files.

batch-set-fullscreen-viewer-preference.title: Batch Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
batch-set-fullscreen-viewer-preference.description: Processes all PDF files in a directory and sets their viewer preference to open in full‑screen mode using PdfContentEditor.

batch-add-pdf-password__v2.title: Batch Add Password Protection to PDFs in a Folder
batch-add-pdf-password__v2.description: Encrypts all PDF files in a specified folder with the same user password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity.

pdf-to-png-transparent__v2.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images with Transparent Background
pdf-to-png-transparent__v2.description: Converts each page of a PDF document to a PNG image with a transparent background at 150 DPI.

batch-reposition-stamps.title: Batch Reposition Stamps to Top-Center of PDF Pages
batch-reposition-stamps.description: Loads multiple PDF files, moves any existing page stamps to the top‑center of each page, and saves the modified PDFs.

add-hyperlink-annotation-page-two.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page Two
add-hyperlink-annotation-page-two.description: Demonstrates adding a clickable hyperlink annotation that opens https://example.com on the second page of a PDF.

add-javascript-calculation__v2.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Field
add-javascript-calculation__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a document‑level JavaScript action that calculates the total amount when the Quantity field changes in a PDF form.

extract-grayscale-images-page-five__v2.title: Extract Grayscale Images from a Specific PDF Page
extract-grayscale-images-page-five__v2.description: Loads a PDF, converts page five to grayscale, extracts all images from that page, and saves them as JPEG files.

center-stamp-page-eight__v2.title: Center Stamp on Page Eight of PDF
center-stamp-page-eight__v2.description: Adds an image stamp to a PDF and repositions it to the horizontal and vertical center of page eight using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-annotation-text__v2.title: Replace Text Within Annotations on Specific Pages
replace-annotation-text__v2.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text inside annotation contents on selected pages while leaving the main PDF content unchanged.

hide-toolbar-menubar__v2.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF Viewer
hide-toolbar-menubar__v2.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar when the document is opened.

add-pdf-attachment-mime.title: Add PDF Attachment with Custom MIME Type
add-pdf-attachment-mime.description: Demonstrates how to embed a PDF file as an attachment with a custom MIME type and description using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-attachment-by-pattern__v2.title: Remove PDF Attachments Matching a Filename Pattern
remove-attachment-by-pattern__v2.description: Demonstrates how to delete embedded file attachments whose names end with "_old.pdf" from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-aes128-restrict-permissions_.title: Encrypt PDF with 128-bit AES and Restrict Permissions
encrypt-pdf-aes128-restrict-permissions_.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit AES encryption while limiting editing and printing capabilities.

add-custom-xmp-metadata__v2.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-xmp-metadata__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom XMP metadata field (ProjectID) to a PDF and save the updated document.

add-image-stamp-base64__v2.title: Add Image Stamp from Base64 to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-base64__v2.description: Demonstrates decoding a Base64 image, creating an ImageStamp, and placing it on page three of a PDF at a 50 mm offset.

multiline-text-stamp__v2.title: Create Multiline Text Stamp with Custom Font
multiline-text-stamp__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a multiline text stamp with Arial font, size 14, and blue color to a PDF page.

fill-form-fields-from-json__v2.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from JSON
fill-form-fields-from-json__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing form field values from a JSON string, and saving the updated document.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png__v2.title: Convert PDF Pages 2‑4 to PNG Images with 200 DPI and Transparent Background
convert-pdf-pages-to-png__v2.description: Demonstrates how to extract pages 2 to 4 from a PDF and save each as a 200 DPI PNG image with a transparent background.

print-pdf-network-printer__v2.title: Print PDF Silently to Network Printer
print-pdf-network-printer__v2.description: Demonstrates how to send a PDF file directly to a network printer using Aspose.Pdf without displaying any print dialog.

add-dashed-rectangle-annotation__v2.title: Add Dashed Rectangle Annotation with Opacity to PDF Page
add-dashed-rectangle-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a rectangle (square) annotation with a dashed border and 50% opacity on page six of a PDF.

add-js-page-open-log__v2.title: Add JavaScript Action to Log Page Number on Page Open
add-js-page-open-log__v2.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to each page that logs the current page number to the console when the page is opened.

extract-images-catalog__v2.title: Extract Images and Create PDF Catalog with Thumbnails
extract-images-catalog__v2.description: Extracts all images from a PDF and generates a new PDF containing thumbnail previews of each image on separate pages.

reposition-stamp-baseline-page-five.title: Reposition Text Stamp to Baseline on Page Five
reposition-stamp-baseline-page-five.description: Adds a text stamp to page five of a PDF and moves it so its baseline aligns with the first paragraph's baseline on that page.

replace-dates-regex__v2.title: Replace Dates Using Regular Expression in PDF
replace-dates-regex__v2.description: Demonstrates how to replace dates formatted as MM/DD/YYYY with YYYY-MM-DD in a PDF using PdfContentEditor and a regular expression.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences__v2.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences for Thumbnails Pane and Fit Width
set-pdf-viewer-preferences__v2.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF to open with the thumbnails pane visible and the window sized to fit the page width using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

modify-pdf-creator-xmp.title: Modify PDF Creator Field via XMP Metadata
modify-pdf-creator-xmp.description: Demonstrates how to read existing XMP metadata, change the Creator property, and save the updated PDF.

add-encrypted-attachment__v2.title: Add Encrypted Attachment to PDF with AES
add-encrypted-attachment__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a custom description to a PDF and then encrypting the PDF using AES‑256.

remove-all-bookmarks__v2.title: Remove All Bookmarks from PDF
remove-all-bookmarks__v2.description: Demonstrates how to delete every bookmark in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-nested-bookmarks__v4.title: Create Nested Bookmarks in PDF
create-nested-bookmarks__v4.description: Demonstrates how to add three‑level nested bookmarks (chapter, section, sub‑section) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-centered-underlined-text-stamp.title: Add Centered Underlined Text Stamp with Yellow Background to PDF Page 10
add-centered-underlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding a centered, underlined text stamp with a yellow background to page 10 of a PDF document.

add-image-stamp-rotation.title: Add Image Stamp with Rotation and Opacity to PDF
add-image-stamp-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF, set its position, rotate it by 45 degrees, and apply 80% opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

fill-form-fields-from-config.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from Configuration File
fill-form-fields-from-config.description: Loads a PDF form, reads default field values from a simple configuration file, fills the fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and saves the updated document.

pdf-to-bmp.title: Convert PDF Pages to BMP Images (24-bit)
pdf-to-bmp.description: Converts each page of a PDF document to a 24‑bit BMP image using Aspose.Pdf's BmpDevice.

print-pdf-duplex-collated__v2.title: Print PDF with Duplex and Collated Copies
print-pdf-duplex-collated__v2.description: Demonstrates how to print a PDF using Aspose.Pdf with double‑sided (duplex) mode and collated multiple copies.

add-rectangle-annotation__v2.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Fill Color and Border
add-rectangle-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a rectangle (square) annotation with a light gray fill and a 1 pt border to a PDF page.

add-js-validation-to-pdf-form.title: Add JavaScript Validation to PDF Form Button
add-js-validation-to-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates adding a JavaScript action to a PDF form button that checks required fields and shows an alert if any are missing.

add-external-url-bookmark.title: Add External URL Bookmark to PDF
add-external-url-bookmark.description: Demonstrates how to add a bookmark that opens an external URL when selected using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-ui-disable-page-transitions.title: Hide UI and Disable Page Transitions in PDF
hide-ui-disable-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to hide scrollbars and other UI elements and remove page transition effects using PdfContentEditor and Document APIs.

extract-viewer-preferences.title: Extract Viewer Preferences and Save Layout & Zoom to JSON
extract-viewer-preferences.description: Reads viewer preference flags from a PDF, determines the page layout, obtains the current zoom factor, and writes these settings to a JSON configuration file.

add-attachment-modification-date.title: Add File Attachment with Modification Date to PDF
add-attachment-modification-date.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF and set its modification date to the current UTC time for auditing.

remove-specific-bookmark.title: Remove Specific Bookmark from PDF
remove-specific-bookmark.description: Demonstrates how to delete a bookmark with a given title from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-text-stamp-shadow.title: Add Text Stamp with Shadow Effect to PDF
add-text-stamp-shadow.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp with a shadow effect, using font size 12, positioned at the top of the first page of a PDF.

add-image-stamp-from-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-stream.description: Demonstrates how to create an image stamp directly from a memory stream and apply it to a PDF without writing the image to disk.

png-to-pdf.title: Convert PNG Images to Multi‑Page PDF
png-to-pdf.description: Creates a PDF where each PNG image becomes a separate page using Aspose.Pdf for .NET with default margins.

print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.title: Print PDF with Custom Page Ranges
print-pdf-custom-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates printing specific page ranges (1‑5 and 8‑10) of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer and PrintDocument.

add-semi-transparent-annotation.title: Add Semi-Transparent Annotation to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a markup annotation with 60% opacity to the third page of a PDF document.

extract-images-rename.title: Extract Images from PDF and Rename with Page and Index
extract-images-rename.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and saves them with filenames that include the source page number and image index.

replace-text-preserve-format.title: Replace Text While Preserving Original Formatting
replace-text-preserve-format.description: Demonstrates how to replace a string in a PDF document using PdfContentEditor while keeping the original font, size, and color.

add-file-attachment-data.title: Add File Attachment with Data Relationship to PDF
add-file-attachment-data.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF page and set its AFRelationship to Data for better document organization.

add-corporate-branding-xmp-metadata.title: Add Corporate Branding XMP Metadata to PDF
add-corporate-branding-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to embed custom XMP metadata such as a logo URL and brand color into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiline-text-stamp-bottom-page-fou.title: Add Right-Aligned Multiline Text Stamp to Bottom of Page Four
add-multiline-text-stamp-bottom-page-fou.description: Demonstrates how to create a multiline right‑aligned text stamp and place it at the bottom of the fourth page of a PDF.

add-image-stamp-from-url.title: Add Image Stamp from URL to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-from-url.description: Downloads an image from a URL and adds it as a stamp on the second page of a PDF document.

pdf-to-png-thumbnail.title: Convert PDF to PNG with 300 DPI and Transparent Background
pdf-to-png-thumbnail.description: Converts each page of a PDF into a PNG image at 300 DPI with a transparent background, suitable for UI thumbnails.

jpeg-to-pdf__v3.title: Convert Multiple JPEG Images to a Single PDF
jpeg-to-pdf__v3.description: Creates a PDF document where each JPEG image is placed on its own page.

add-rectangle-annotation-dash-opacity.title: Add Rectangle Annotation with Dash Pattern and Opacity
add-rectangle-annotation-dash-opacity.description: Demonstrates how to add a rectangle (square) annotation with a custom dash pattern and 75% opacity to the first page of a PDF.

add-js-confirmation-submit.title: Add JavaScript Confirmation to PDF Form Submit Button
add-js-confirmation-submit.description: Demonstrates adding a push‑button with a JavaScript action that asks for confirmation before submitting the PDF form.

add-url-bookmark.title: Add URL Bookmark to PDF
add-url-bookmark.description: Demonstrates adding a bookmark named Help that opens an online documentation URL when clicked.

set-fixed-zoom-hide-ui.title: Set Fixed Zoom and Hide UI Controls in PDF
set-fixed-zoom-hide-ui.description: Demonstrates how to fix the zoom level of a PDF and hide viewer UI elements such as zoom controls using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-xmp-metadata-field.title: Add XMP Metadata Field to PDF
add-xmp-metadata-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom XMP metadata field 'Department' with value 'Finance' to a PDF and save it.

add-center-bold-red-text-stamp.title: Add Centered Bold Red Text Stamp to Page Five
add-center-bold-red-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a centered bold red text stamp on the fifth page of a PDF.

add-image-stamp-from-stream__v2.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream Scaled to 50%
add-image-stamp-from-stream__v2.description: Demonstrates creating an ImageStamp from a memory stream, scaling it to 50%, and adding it to a PDF page.

fill-acroform-from-xml.title: Fill AcroForm fields from XML using XPath
fill-acroform-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, extracting values with XPath, and filling AcroForm fields in a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

add-green-circle-annotation.title: Add Green Filled Circle Annotation with Border to PDF Page
add-green-circle-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a circle annotation with a green fill and a 3 pt border to the second page of a PDF.

add-file-attachment__v3.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment__v3.description: Demonstrates how to attach a local file to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

embed-memory-stream-attachment.title: Embed Memory Stream as Attachment using PdfContentEditor
embed-memory-stream-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file from a memory stream to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

attach-multiple-files.title: Attach Multiple Files to a PDF Document
attach-multiple-files.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a list of files and attach each as a document attachment to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-document-attachment.title: Add Document Attachment with Description to PDF
add-document-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file attachment into a PDF and provide a descriptive label using PdfContentEditor.

add-attachment-custom-mime-type.title: Add Attachment with Custom MIME Type to PDF
add-attachment-custom-mime-type.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file attachment with a custom MIME type into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

remove-embedded-attachments.title: Remove All Embedded Attachments from PDF
remove-embedded-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to delete all embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

add-document-attachment__v2.title: Add Document Attachment While Preserving Existing Attachments
add-document-attachment__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a new file attachment to a PDF without deleting existing attachments using PdfContentEditor.

remove-add-attachments.title: Remove and Add Attachments to PDF
remove-add-attachments.description: Shows how to delete all existing file attachments from a PDF and then add new attachments using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

attach-file-from-network-stream.title: Attach File from Network Stream to PDF
attach-file-from-network-stream.description: Demonstrates downloading a file into a byte array, creating a memory stream, and attaching it to a PDF using PdfContentEditor.

add-large-attachment-memory-check.title: Add Large File Attachment to PDF and Monitor Memory Usage
add-large-attachment-memory-check.description: Demonstrates adding a >10 MB file attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor while keeping memory usage within the configured limit.

add-document-attachment-retrieve-name.title: Add Document Attachment and Retrieve Its Name
add-document-attachment-retrieve-name.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then reading back the attachment's file name with PdfExtractor.

delete-attachments-verify-count.title: Delete All Attachments and Verify Count
delete-attachments-verify-count.description: Deletes all attachments from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and verifies that the attachment count is zero with PdfExtractor.

add-list-attachment.title: Add and List Attachments in PDF
add-list-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and then list all attachment names with PdfExtractor.

add-unicode-attachment.title: Add Unicode Attachment Description to PDF
add-unicode-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment with a Unicode description to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-embedded-file-attachment.title: Add Embedded File Attachment to PDF
add-embedded-file-attachment.description: Shows how to embed a file into a PDF document using PdfContentEditor without creating a visible annotation.

add-attachment-checksum.title: Add Attachment and Store MD5 Checksum in PDF Metadata
add-attachment-checksum.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF, retrieving its MD5 checksum via FileParams.CheckSum, and storing the checksum in the document's custom metadata for integrity verification.

encrypt-attachment-add-pdf.title: Encrypt Attachment and Add to PDF
encrypt-attachment-add-pdf.description: Encrypts a PDF attachment with a password using PdfFileSecurity and embeds it into another PDF.

add-verify-attachment.title: Add and Verify Attachment in PDF
add-verify-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment to a PDF, extracting it, and confirming the extracted content matches the original file.

set-centerwindow-viewer-preference.title: Set CenterWindow Viewer Preference in PDF
set-centerwindow-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to enable the CenterWindow viewer preference so the PDF opens centered on the screen.

hide-pdf-menubar.title: Hide PDF Menu Bar Viewer Preference
hide-pdf-menubar.description: Demonstrates how to set the HideMenubar viewer preference so the PDF viewer hides the menu bar when the document is opened.

set-pdf-fullscreen.title: Set PDF to Open in Full‑Screen Mode
set-pdf-fullscreen.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference so the PDF opens automatically in full‑screen mode.

set-viewer-preference-use-outlines.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outline Panel
set-viewer-preference-use-outlines.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF so that the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default when opened.

combine-viewer-preferences.title: Combine Viewer Preferences in PDF
combine-viewer-preferences.description: Shows how to set multiple viewer preferences (CenterWindow and HideToolbar) on a PDF using PdfContentEditor before saving.

retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences
retrieve-pdf-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to read the viewer preference flags from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.title: Set HideMenubar Viewer Preference in PDF
set-hide-menubar-viewer-preference.description: Reads the current viewer preferences of a PDF, sets the HideMenubar flag, and saves the updated document.

change-viewer-preferences.title: Change PDF Viewer Preferences and Save
change-viewer-preferences.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF viewer preferences such as hiding the menu bar and toolbar using PdfContentEditor and save the result.

export-modified-pdf-to-memory-stream.title: Export Modified PDF to MemoryStream
export-modified-pdf-to-memory-stream.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation, and exports the modified document to a MemoryStream for further processing.

hide-toolbar-viewer-preference.title: Hide Toolbar Viewer Preference in PDF
hide-toolbar-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to set the HideToolbar viewer preference so the PDF opens without the toolbar.

hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.title: Hide Scrollbars Viewer Preference in PDF
hide-scrollbars-viewer-preference.description: Shows how to hide UI elements like scrollbars in a PDF by setting the HideWindowUI viewer preference.

set-pdf-display-doc-title.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Display Document Title
set-pdf-display-doc-title.description: Demonstrates how to set the document title and enable the DisplayDocTitle viewer preference so the title appears in the PDF viewer window.

retrieve-viewer-preferences-xml.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences and Save to XML
retrieve-viewer-preferences-xml.description: Loads a PDF, reads its viewer preferences using PdfContentEditor, and writes the preferences to an XML configuration file.

apply-viewer-preferences.title: Apply Viewer Preferences from JSON to PDFs
apply-viewer-preferences.description: Reads viewer preference flags from a JSON file and applies them to each specified PDF using PdfContentEditor.

set-hide-toolbar-menubar.title: Set HideToolbar and HideMenubar Viewer Preferences
set-hide-toolbar-menubar.description: Demonstrates how to hide the toolbar and menu bar in a PDF by setting the corresponding viewer preference flags.

retrieve-viewer-preferences.title: Retrieve Viewer Preferences After Each Edit
retrieve-viewer-preferences.description: Shows how to change viewer preferences using PdfContentEditor and retrieve the current preference flags after each change to verify incremental updates.

set-viewer-preference-single-page.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout
set-viewer-preference-single-page.description: Shows how to configure a PDF so that viewers display one page at a time by using PdfContentEditor to change the viewer preference.

set-continuous-view-mode.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF Viewer
set-continuous-view-mode.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF to use continuous scrolling (one column layout) by changing the viewer preference with PdfContentEditor.

implement-a-toggle-function-that-switche.title: Implement A Toggle Function That Switches Fullscreen Viewer Preference On Or Off Dynamically

add-free-text-annotation.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with Helvetica Font
add-free-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a free‑text annotation to a PDF page using Helvetica 12‑pt font and blue color.

add-highlight-annotation__v3.title: Add Highlight Annotation to PDF Page
add-highlight-annotation__v3.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation over a specific text range on page three of a PDF.

add-underline-annotation.title: Add Underline Annotation to Specific Phrase on Fourth Page
add-underline-annotation.description: Demonstrates locating a phrase on page 4 of a PDF and adding an underline annotation beneath it.

add-square-annotation.title: Add Square Annotation with Red Border and Semi-Transparent Fill
add-square-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a square annotation with a red border and semi‑transparent fill to page five of a PDF.

add-circle-annotation.title: Add Circle Annotation with Thick Green Outline
add-circle-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a circle annotation with a thick green outline around a diagram on page six of a PDF.

create-hover-popup-annotation.title: Create Hover Popup Annotation in PDF
create-hover-popup-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a popup annotation that shows a note when the user hovers over a text annotation in a PDF.

batch-add-annotations.title: Batch Add Multiple Annotations to PDF
batch-add-annotations.description: Demonstrates adding several annotations (text notes and link) to a PDF page using a loop over annotation definitions.

add-semi-transparent-annotation__v2.title: Add Semi-Transparent Annotation to PDF
add-semi-transparent-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation with 50% opacity to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-annotation-opacity-blend-mode.title: Set Annotation Opacity and Blend Mode
set-annotation-opacity-blend-mode.description: Demonstrates how to set an annotation's opacity to 0.75 and apply the Multiply blend mode for a subtle visual effect.

rotate-text-annotation.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
rotate-text-annotation.description: Adds a free‑text annotation to a PDF page and rotates it 90° to align with diagonal content.

custom-annotation-appearance.title: Add Rubber Stamp Annotation with Custom Appearance Stream
custom-annotation-appearance.description: Demonstrates adding a rubber‑stamp annotation whose visual appearance is taken from a custom PDF stream.

add-annotation-custom-border.title: Add Annotation with Custom Border Thickness
add-annotation-custom-border.description: Demonstrates adding a square annotation to a PDF page and setting its border width to three points for enhanced visibility.

dashed-rectangle-annotation.title: Create Dashed Border for Rectangle Annotation
dashed-rectangle-annotation.description: Adds a rectangle annotation to a PDF page and sets its border style to dashed for visual distinction.

rotate-image-stamp.title: Rotate Image Stamp Annotation 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-image-stamp.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp to a PDF and rotating it 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-file-attachment-annotation.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment annotation that opens an attached file when the user clicks the annotation area using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-alert-annotation.title: Add JavaScript Alert Annotation to PDF
add-javascript-alert-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that runs a JavaScript alert when clicked.

add-tooltip-annotation.title: Add Tooltip Annotation to PDF
add-tooltip-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextAnnotation that shows a tooltip when the mouse hovers over it.

add-dashed-line-annotation.title: Add Dashed Line Annotation to PDF
add-dashed-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a line annotation with a custom dash pattern to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-popup-annotation.title: Add Popup Annotation with Multi-line Bullet Points
add-popup-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a popup annotation containing a multi‑line bullet‑point list in a PDF.

add-rotated-stamp.title: Add Rotated Stamp Annotation to PDF
add-rotated-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a stamp annotation on a PDF page and rotate it 45 degrees for diagonal placement.

add-rtl-free-text-annotation.title: Add Right-to-Left Free Text Annotation
add-rtl-free-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a free‑text annotation with right‑to‑left language support to verify Unicode rendering.

insert-internal-hyperlink.title: Insert Internal Hyperlink Annotation to PDF Page
insert-internal-hyperlink.description: Demonstrates how to add a link annotation that jumps to a specific page within the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-highlight-border-color.title: Set Highlight Annotation Border Color to Red
set-highlight-border-color.description: Demonstrates how to add a highlight annotation to a PDF page and set its border color to bright red for emphasis.

add-free-text-html-annotation.title: Add Free‑Text Annotation with HTML Rich Text
add-free-text-html-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a free‑text annotation containing HTML rich text to a PDF page.

add-text-annotation-author.title: Add Text Annotation with Author Metadata
add-text-annotation-author.description: Demonstrates adding a sticky‑note annotation to a PDF page and setting the author metadata via the Title property.

add-timestamped-annotation.title: Add Timestamped Annotation to PDF
add-timestamped-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF and set its creation and modification dates to the current UTC time.

assign-subject-to-annotation.title: Assign Subject to PDF Annotation
assign-subject-to-annotation.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF page and set its Subject property for easier searching and categorization.

lock-pdf-annotation.title: Lock PDF Annotation to Prevent Editing
lock-pdf-annotation.description: Creates a text annotation and sets its Locked flag so end users cannot modify or delete the annotation.

hide-annotation-fullscreen.title: Hide Annotation in FullScreen Viewer Mode
hide-annotation-fullscreen.description: Adds a hidden annotation to a PDF and enables FullScreen viewer preference so the annotation remains invisible during full-screen display.

replace-text-pdf__v2.title: Replace Text in PDF Using PdfContentEditor
replace-text-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to replace every occurrence of the word "Draft" with "Final" in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

replace-text-page-two.title: Replace Text on Specific Page Preserving Font Style
replace-text-page-two.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific string on page two of a PDF while keeping the original font formatting.

replace-text-regex-all-pages.title: Replace Text Matching Regex Across All PDF Pages
replace-text-regex-all-pages.description: Shows how to replace text that matches a regular expression on every page of a PDF while preserving the original formatting.

replace-text-page-three.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Page
replace-text-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific string only on page three of a PDF using PdfContentEditor.

replace-phrase-bold.title: Replace Phrase and Apply Bold Style in PDF
replace-phrase-bold.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific phrase in a PDF with new text styled in bold while preserving the original font size.

insert-blank-page-header.title: Insert Blank Page and Add Header Annotation
insert-blank-page-header.description: Demonstrates inserting a new blank page at position three and adding a header annotation to it using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

delete-page-five.title: Delete Specific Page from PDF
delete-page-five.description: Demonstrates how to remove page five from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save the result.

move-last-page-to-beginning.title: Move Last Page to Beginning of PDF
move-last-page-to-beginning.description: Demonstrates how to reorder pages by moving the last page to the first position in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

merge-pdf-with-annotations.title: Merge PDF with Annotations
merge-pdf-with-annotations.description: Adds a text annotation to the first PDF and then merges a second PDF into the edited document.

split-pdf-single-pages.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files Preserving Annotations
split-pdf-single-pages.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF (including its annotations) into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

add-image-annotation-with-caption.title: Add Image Annotation with Caption to PDF
add-image-annotation-with-caption.description: Demonstrates how to place an image as a rubber‑stamp annotation at specific coordinates and add a caption underneath.

add-image-attachment-stamp.title: Add Image Attachment and Stamp Annotation to PDF
add-image-attachment-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to attach an image file to a PDF and then place that image as a stamp annotation on the document.

add-watermark-annotation.title: Add Watermark Annotation to All PDFs in a Folder
add-watermark-annotation.description: Adds a standard text watermark annotation to every page of each PDF file in a specified folder and saves the watermarked PDFs.

batch-add-annotations__v2.title: Batch Add Annotations to PDF from JSON Definition
batch-add-annotations__v2.description: Reads a JSON file describing annotation details and adds the specified annotations to a PDF document.

encrypt-pdf-with-attachments-and-viewer-.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password after Adding Attachments and Viewer Preferences
encrypt-pdf-with-attachments-and-viewer-.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment and setting viewer preferences, then encrypting the PDF with a user password.

add-file-attachment-secured-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to Secured PDF
add-file-attachment-secured-pdf.description: Opens a password-protected PDF, adds a file attachment annotation, and saves the modified document.

add-attachment-batch.title: Add Same Attachment to Multiple PDFs in Batch
add-attachment-batch.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to each PDF in a collection using PdfContentEditor.

apply-viewer-preferences__v2.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Multiple PDFs
apply-viewer-preferences__v2.description: Iterates over a list of PDF files, sets the same viewer preference for each, and saves the modified PDFs.

concurrent-pdf-batch-processing.title: Concurrent PDF Batch Processing with Parallel.ForEach
concurrent-pdf-batch-processing.description: Demonstrates loading, editing, and saving multiple PDF files in parallel using Parallel.ForEach to speed up batch operations.

batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.title: Batch Remove Attachments and Add Disclaimer Annotation to PDFs
batch-remove-attachments-add-disclaimer.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, removes any embedded attachments, and adds a standardized disclaimer text annotation to each document.

add-attachment-viewer-preference.title: Add Attachment and Set Viewer Preference in PDF
add-attachment-viewer-preference.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF and change the viewer preference to show the attachment panel using Aspose.Pdf.

add-pdf-attachment-async.title: Add File Attachment to PDF Asynchronously
add-pdf-attachment-async.description: Demonstrates adding a document attachment to a PDF using PdfContentEditor inside a Task to avoid blocking the UI thread.

add-large-stream-attachment.title: Add Large Stream Attachment to PDF with Optimized Memory Usage
add-large-stream-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding a large file as a PDF attachment using a buffered OptimizedMemoryStream to keep memory consumption low.

add-network-attachment-retry.title: Add Network Attachment with Retry Logic
add-network-attachment-retry.description: Demonstrates adding a file attachment from a network stream to a PDF using PdfContentEditor with retry logic for timeout failures.

validate-pdf-integrity.title: Validate PDF Integrity by Comparing SHA-256 Checksums
validate-pdf-integrity.description: Loads a PDF, computes its SHA‑256 checksum, makes a simple modification, saves it, then recomputes and compares the checksums to verify integrity.

compare-pdf-file-sizes.title: Compare PDF File Sizes Before and After Editing
compare-pdf-file-sizes.description: Loads a PDF, makes a simple edit, saves it, and compares the file sizes of the original and edited documents to verify that changes were applied.

export-pdf-annotations-json.title: Export PDF Annotations to JSON
export-pdf-annotations-json.description: Exports all annotations from a PDF document to a JSON file by first exporting to XFDF and then converting the XML to JSON.

verify-pdf-attachment.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
verify-pdf-attachment.description: Unit test that adds a file attachment to a PDF, saves it, and confirms the attachment exists using Aspose.Pdf facades.

viewer-preference-persistence-test.title: Verify Viewer Preference Persistence in PDF
viewer-preference-persistence-test.description: Unit test that sets viewer preferences using PdfContentEditor, saves the PDF, reopens it and confirms the preferences are retained.

create-a-unit-test-ensuring-a-text-annot.title: Create A Unit Test Ensuring A Text Annotation Is Positioned At Expected Coordinates On A Page

log-pdf-edit-operations.title: Log PDF Edit Operations with Timestamp
log-pdf-edit-operations.description: Demonstrates how to perform PDF edits (annotation, text replace, image delete) and record each operation with a timestamp and the PDF file name.

add-document-attachment-error-handling.title: Add Document Attachment with Error Handling
add-document-attachment-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to a PDF using PdfContentEditor while checking that the attachment file exists.

dispose-pdfcontenteditor.title: Dispose PdfContentEditor with finally block
dispose-pdfcontenteditor.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfContentEditor to modify a PDF and ensure the editor is properly disposed in a finally block to avoid memory leaks.

dispose-pdfcontenteditor__v2.title: Dispose PdfContentEditor with Using Statement
dispose-pdfcontenteditor__v2.description: Demonstrates how to wrap PdfContentEditor in a using block so it is automatically disposed after editing a PDF.

edit-pdf-document.title: Edit PDF Document with Annotations, Shapes, and Stamps
edit-pdf-document.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a text annotation, a hyperlink, a rectangle shape, and an image stamp, then saving the edited PDF.

simple-pdf-editor-wrapper.title: Simple PDF Editor Wrapper Using PdfContentEditor
simple-pdf-editor-wrapper.description: Demonstrates a lightweight wrapper class around Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to load a PDF, add a text annotation, replace text, and save the result.

map-viewer-preferences.title: Map Viewer Preferences to UI Toggles and Apply Changes
map-viewer-preferences.description: Shows how to read PDF viewer preferences, map them to UI toggle controls, let the user modify them, and write the updated preferences back to the PDF.

apply-viewer-preferences-decrypted-pdf.title: Apply Viewer Preferences to Decrypted PDF
apply-viewer-preferences-decrypted-pdf.description: Decrypts an encrypted PDF using the supplied password, sets a viewer preference (e.g., hide toolbar), and saves the updated document.

retrieve-viewer-preferences-xml__v2.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences and Export to XML
retrieve-viewer-preferences-xml__v2.description: Demonstrates how to read viewer preference flags from a PDF using PdfContentEditor and serialize them into an XML file for legacy integration.

set-pdf-viewer-pagemode-usenone.title: Set PDF Viewer PageMode to UseNone
set-pdf-viewer-pagemode-usenone.description: Demonstrates how to set the PDF viewer's PageMode to UseNone, hiding navigation panels when the document is opened.

add-text-annotation.title: Add Text Annotation to PDF Page
add-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a text (sticky note) annotation at specific coordinates on the first page of a PDF.

add-web-link-annotation.title: Add External Web Link Annotation to PDF
add-web-link-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to insert a link annotation that opens an external website when clicked.

add-image-stamp-annotation.title: Add Image Stamp Annotation to PDF Page
add-image-stamp-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a stamp annotation with an image to the second page of a PDF document.

add-line-annotation-arrowheads.title: Add Line Annotation with Arrowheads to PDF
add-line-annotation-arrowheads.description: Demonstrates how to create a line annotation with arrowheads at both ends on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt, Edit, and Re‑encrypt PDF
decrypt-edit-reencrypt-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF, decrypt it, modify its content, and then re‑encrypt it before saving.

import-annotations-json.title: Import Annotations from JSON and Apply to PDF using PdfContentEditor
import-annotations-json.description: Loads annotation definitions from a JSON file and adds them to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.
